name: delphi-pro
description: DELPHI PRO Research Orchestrator — multi-depth research pipeline with scout subagents, critic evaluation, and multi-channel distribution.
mcp_strategy_note: DELPHI PRO uses globally-configured MCP servers (Cortex, Tavily, Exa, ArXiv, Wikipedia, DexPaprika). Brave Search uses curl CLI (brave-search.sh) not MCP. No plugin-specific MCP servers. API keys managed via ~/.nexus/.env and macOS Keychain.
